exceptions.reason: academy_students remains a global principal registry during the staged multi-tenant migration.
exceptions.compensatingControl: platform_principal_bindings proves tenant/workspace membership and Offline Sync composite foreign keys reject unbound writes.

exceptions.reason: platform_memberships.user_id is a legacy text identity without an explicit principal type.
exceptions.compensatingControl: TenantPrincipalContext resolves typed student/account bindings before sensitive mutations.

exceptions.reason: Withdrawal queue names are global while custody remains single-tenant and disabled for production launch.
exceptions.compensatingControl: Queue payloads contain identity triggers only; PostgreSQL claims and withdrawal records own the authoritative state.

exceptions.reason: Offline browser storage remains as a transport queue during server migration.
exceptions.compensatingControl: Signed principal scope, canonical TenantPrincipalContext and PostgreSQL idempotency/FK authority prevent browser data from becoming source of truth.
